title: NistEcdhPublicKey::from_bytes does not validate curve point
description: NistEcdhPublicKey::from_bytes only checks buffer length and the 0x04 prefix byte. It does not call wc_ecc_import_x963 or wc_ecc_check_key. Point validation happens later inside diffie_hellman. This is inconsistent with EcdsaVerifyingKey::from_uncompressed_point which validates on construction. The type name implies a validated key; callers in DHIES-style protocols may rely on construction-time validation. Fix: either validate on construction (matching EcdsaVerifyingKey) or rename to from_bytes_unchecked to make the missing validation explicit.
